AC: 19
STR: +9
WT: 15.0 Size: LARGE

info
QuoteReply
# May 13 2004 at 1:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593375035899
532 posts
The info is it was probably one of the best things you could get back in original EQ but 19ac and 9str won't even sell today. Maybe a lvl nothing newbie could enjoy it during the rough period in levelling up those first 20 level but beyond that just bank it for a trophy of mistmore or vendor it...

Liveye (lvl 65 Wizard)

# Apr 17 2002 at 4:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776895484
2 posts
I have on of these on Veeshan and am wondering the value of it, just curious that's all. Also I'm a lvl 23 warrior and have had this BP since lvl 9 :) I got it off of my Hubby's old char. Hehe wasn't I lucky. Well any info on this item would be much appreciated, thank-you.

When ever you see gear from and old zone you need to think about the time and the gear available then. Pre kunark this armor could compete with the paly and SK class armor
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 9:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why the hell would you want this when you can get a Ry`Gorr Battle Mail for cheaper price and its like 18ac 10str and some other stuff. And more class can use Ry`Gorr. And don't forget Ry`Gorr Battle Mail is way easier to get than this.
RE: Ry`Gorr Battle Mail
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 3:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763257273
1 post
The reason for getting this item rather then an easier one is the same as many others who I've met hunting Mistmoore Castle. It is for the honor of taking down a rare hard spawn in nasty dungeon and for the adventure of it.
▲ Page top
RE: Ry`Gorr Battle Mail
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 2:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246460789
View User Forum
513 posts
No, the Battle Mail is not easier to get than this.

Yes, this is a rare drop... but Garton can be camped by a group in their mid-30's. The Ry'Gorr Chief can't be camped until your mid-40's.
▲ Page top
RE: Ry`Gorr Battle Mail
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2001 at 8:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592345757329
13 posts
Battle Mail is a whole lot easier to get. A high lvl druid can easily solo the Chief (if done right). But if you go into MM, you will get smoked. Just my 2cps.

# Aug 23 2007 at 7:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342921442
1 post
Druids rule buddy, just quad kited in the plane of fear the other day, 0 mana, just using my manaless dots and items such as Rowyl's Bracers of Nature, look it up, it rocks. just my 2cp


Leafbringer Starwolf
55 Preserver of (Vallon) Zek
▲ Page top
Str for damage max.
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 10:50 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
hmmm, have you ever oplayed a melee class _ High Str does not only affect carrying capacity but also max damage for your primary weapon. So even if the weight of the plate cancels out the Strength gain to carrying capacity, the Sr bonus will still work. Neverthelss, there much better breastplates IMHO..
▲ Page top
you are low str hu
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
then why would someone with low str want an item that is 15stones ? makes no sense dude
▲ Page top
RE: you are low str hu
QuoteReply
# May 21 2002 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
Because the 9 STR added by this item increases the wearers ATK stat. Although this item weighs 15 (not stones...units. 15 stones would be the weight of a large man) the added 9 strength means that the max encumberance is increased and the wearer is only 6 closer to being encumbered (assuming a previously empty chest slot)
▲ Page top
RE: you are low str hu
QuoteReply
